topPlaces.name: Bhageshwari
topPlaces.description: Bhageshwari or Bhagesri is a village in Dadri Tehsil of Charkhi Dadri district, Haryana, India. It is situated 14 kilometres (8.7 mi) away from district headquarter Charkhi Dadri.

topPlaces.name: Sanjerwas
topPlaces.description: Sanjerwas is a village in the Charkhi Dadri district of the Indian state of Haryana. Sanjarwas village is situated near the Charkhi Dadri-Kalanur State Highway.

topPlaces.name: Phogat, Charkhi Dadri
topPlaces.description: Phogat is a village in the Charkhi Dadri district of the Indian state of Haryana. It lies approximately 18 kilometres (11 mi) south of the district headquarters Charkhi Dadri.

topPlaces.name: Hindol, Bhiwani
topPlaces.description: Hindol is a village in the Bhiwani district of the Indian state of Haryana. Located in the Charkhi Dadri tehsil, it lies approximately 16 kilometres (9.9 mi) southeast of the district headquarters town of Bhiwani.

topPlaces.name: Achina, Bhiwani
topPlaces.description: Achina is a village in the Charkhi Dadri district of the Indian state of Haryana. Part of Hisar Division, it is located 32 kilometres (20 mi) south east of the district headquarters Bhiwani, 12 kilometres (7.5 mi) from Dadri-I and 271 kilometres (168 mi) from the state capital Chandigarh.

topPlaces.name: Nimari, Bhiwani
topPlaces.description: Nimari, also spelt Neemri or Nimri, is a village in the Bhiwani district of the Indian state of Haryana. It lies approximately 22 kilometres (14 mi) east of the district headquarters town of Bhiwani.

items.note: Bhageshwari or Bhagesri is a village in Dadri Tehsil of Charkhi Dadri district, Haryana, India. It is situated 14 kilometres (8.7 mi) away from district headquarter Charkhi Dadri.
Sanjerwas is a village in the Charkhi Dadri district of the Indian state of Haryana. Sanjarwas village is situated near the Charkhi Dadri-Kalanur State Highway.
Phogat is a village in the Charkhi Dadri district of the Indian state of Haryana. It lies approximately 18 kilometres (11 mi) south of the district headquarters Charkhi Dadri.

Hindol is a village in the Bhiwani district of the Indian state of Haryana. Located in the Charkhi Dadri tehsil, it lies approximately 16 kilometres (9.9 mi) southeast of the district headquarters town of Bhiwani.

Achina is a village in the Charkhi Dadri district of the Indian state of Haryana. Part of Hisar Division, it is located 32 kilometres (20 mi) south east of the district headquarters Bhiwani, 12 kilometres (7.5 mi) from Dadri-I and 271 kilometres (168 mi) from the state capital Chandigarh.
Nimari, also spelt Neemri or Nimri, is a village in the Bhiwani district of the Indian state of Haryana. It lies approximately 22 kilometres (14 mi) east of the district headquarters town of Bhiwani.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Ranila?
faq.a: The best time to visit Ranila is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

The nearest airport is Indira Gandhi International Airport, Delhi (75 km) and the nearest railway station is New Delhi Railway Station (85 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Ranila?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Ranila at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Ranila?
faq.a: Stays in Ranila start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Ranila?
faq.a: The top attractions are Bhageshwari, Sanjerwas, Phogat, Charkhi Dadri, Hindol, Bhiwani, Achina, Bhiwani.
